creator: am_dxer@fastmail.fm
text:
Created attachment 170224
dmesg output showing me booting the system, playing audio, suspending the system, resuming the system, and trying to play audio again

When trying to play audio after resuming the system, messages like the following are printed to dmesg.

hdac0: Unexpected unsolicited response from address 0: 00000000
hdac0: Unexpected unsolicited response from address 0: 00000000
hdac0: Command timeout on address 0
hdac0: Reset timeout!
hdac0: Command timeout on address 0

I have been running FreeBSD on this machine for quite a while now and as long as I don't suspend, I have no issues with audio. I will attach dmesg in case this is helpful.
